initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT atom1.atom_id, atom2.atom_id
FROM bond
JOIN connected ON bond.bond_id = connected.bond_id
JOIN atom atom1 ON connected.atom_id = atom1.atom_id
JOIN atom atom2 ON connected.atom_id2 = atom2.atom_id
WHERE bond.bond_type = 'triple';

SELECT atom1.atom_id AS first_atom_id, atom2.atom_id AS second_atom_id
FROM bond
JOIN connected ON bond.bond_id = connected.bond_id
JOIN atom atom1 ON connected.atom_id = atom1.atom_id
JOIN atom atom2 ON connected.atom_id2 = atom2.atom_id
WHERE bond.bond_type = 'triple';

WHERE bond.bond_type = 'triple';
